arts.ttl: Looking at whether Liam Delap is the answer to Chelsea’s problem position – opinion
arts.sum: I love Liam Delap, I’ve always said that. But of course I have concerns, as I would do about any young player we would sign who does not come in with heaps of experience. With Delap though, he’s just turned 22, and he does come with almost 100 senior appearances to his name across Manchester […]

arts.ttl: Surprise boost for Chelsea as player ‘back in the group’ – Unexpected return against Southampton
arts.sum: Chelsea have received an unexpected boost ahead of their clash with Southampton, with Wesley Fofana back in the group. That’s according to journalist Fabrice Hawkins, who reports that the defender is set to make his return for Chelsea in some capacity this evening. arts.sum: Enzo Maresca’s Chelsea host a struggling Southampton side at Stamford Bridge in the Premier League tonight with both sides in desperate need of a win. The Blues have been unable to arrest a slide in form which has seen them win only two out of their last ten league outings. arts.ttl: Chelsea given FREE RUN at Gyokeres transfer as rivals make SHOCK decision
arts.sum: The La Liga giants will reportedly activate a one-year option in Robert Lewandowski ’s contract and continue with the Polish veteran as their number nine next season, with resources instead being used to sign a winger instead of another striker. And Chelsea could now have a free run at Gyokeres after Barcelona became the latest club to bow out of the race for the 26-year-old according to Spanish outlet SPORT .
